name: commit-craft
description: Write clear, conventional git commit messages from your staged changes.

skills.name: writing-commit-messages
skills.description: Draft a clear, conventional-commits-style git commit message that summarizes the staged diff. Use when the user is about to commit, asks for a commit message, or wants their commit wording improved.

activation.prompt: I just staged a bug fix and a small refactor — write me a good commit message for it.
activation.note: positive — drafting a commit message from staged changes

activation.prompt: Rewrite this commit message to follow conventional commits: 'fixed stuff'.
What's a good recipe for dinner tonight?
Review my plugin against the marketplace rules before I add it to the catalog.
activation.note: confusability negative — about plugin validation, must NOT fire the commit skill
